content: Adds 'typecheck': 'tsc --noEmit' to 11 sibling packages so the root 'npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present' actually runs them. 7 packages preserved their 'lint' alias for backward compat; 4 had neither script and now have 'typecheck' only. Local typecheck green across all packages.
source: 11 package.json diffs + 'npm run typecheck' green at repo root
